title: Knockback Axes
description: Grants the ability to add knockback enchanted books to axes
body:
Knockback Axes

Grants the ability to add knockback enchanted books to axes

Features

  • Knockback enchantment can be applied to any axe by holding an enchanted book in the players offhand and an axe in the mainhand.
    Then, interact with an anvil to apply the enchantment if you have sufficent XP levels
  • Last tested on Minecraft 1.20
